raw_text: contactar shernsie@gmail.com www.linkedin.com/in/sergio- hernández-sieiro-28275024b (linkedin) aptitudes principales pasion por el trabajo pilotaje de drones sap erp languages inglés (full professional) francés (elementary) espanol (native or bilingual) sergio hernandez sieiro estudiante en universidad alfonso x el sabio extracto hi there! my name is sergio, a recent aerospace engineering graduate who is eager to gain hands-on experience in the industry. am extremely passionate about aerospace technology and its potential to revolutionize the way we explore our universe. throughout my degree, have developed skills in areas such as aerodynamics, propulsion, and flight dynamics, and have also gained experience in research projects and aerospace systems design. am now looking to leverage this knowledge to contribute to a dynamic and innovative team within the industry. am a proactive and results-driven individual who is always eager to learn and take on new challenges. am excited to bring my skills and enthusiasm to a team that shares my passion for aerospace technology and innovation. experiencia accenture project manager program management office (airbus) noviembre de 2022 - present (8 meses) subcontractor for spare manufacturing engineering&data at airbus defence and space. - on-time delivery of the monthly report, including the coordination and the monitoring of the tasks of airbus stores worldwide. - task planning in aeronautical programs. - support spares me activities for a400m, lta and mrtt platforms. - creation and maintenance of master schedule planning of different programs. - project progress monitoring. - risk management and mitigation actions. page 1 of 2 wolf avionic drone pilot mayo de 2021 - mayo de 2022 (1 ao 1 mes) educación universidad alfonso x el sabio grado en ingeniería, ingeniería aeroespacial, aeronáutica y astronáutica - (septiembre de 2019 - julio de 2023) flybyschool piloto certificado de drones (sts, a1/a3, a2) : (febrero de 2020 - mayo de 2021) page 2 of 2
